title: Knock Knock
description:
Knock Knock! Who's there?

Knock Knock is a small mod that gives a 'knock' sound when you punch a door! Wow!
body:
# Knock Knock

[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=5865F2)](https://discord.tophatcat.dev)
[![CurseForge Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=FF784D)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/knockknock)
[![Modrinth Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=17B85A)](https://modrinth.com/mod/knockknock)
[![Bluesky Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Bluesky-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=bluesky&logoColor=1185FE)](https://bsky.app/profile/tophatcat.dev)
[![Github Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=BBDDE5)](https://github.com/kiris-mods/knock-knock)
[![Website Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/tophatcat.dev-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=&logoColor=57Z29S)](https://tophatcat.dev/mods/knock-knock)

A simple small mod where if you left-click a door it plays a "knock" sound!  
That's quite literally all there is to it, nothing fancy, no custom blocks, just a simple little quality of life mod! :D (Also works on trapdoors!)
